Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4600 "JACKAL-USA-0400-4600" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Jackal (USA) (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 to apply a PAL fix if running on a PAL machine.
